# Stabile versjoner {.unnumbered}

Hver årsversjon (`v{årstall}`) er et øyeblikksbilde av alle norske lover
slik de var ved utgangen av det året, basert på [`law-history`-grenen](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/law-history).

## Årlige versjoner

| Versjon | Bla gjennom | Endringer fra forrige | Omfang |
|---------|-------------|----------------------|--------|
| `v2001` | [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2001/lover) | — | 1191 vedtak |
| `v2002` | [v2002](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2002/lover) | [v2001...v2002](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2001...v2002) | 1400 vedtak |
| `v2003` | [v2003](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2003/lover) | [v2002...v2003](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2002...v2003) | 1525 vedtak |
| `v2004` | [v2004](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2004/lover) | [v2003...v2004](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2003...v2004) | 1652 vedtak |
| `v2005` | [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2005/lover) | [v2004...v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2004...v2005) | 1386 vedtak |
| `v2006` | [v2006](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2006/lover) | [v2005...v2006](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2005...v2006) | 1381 vedtak |
| `v2007` | [v2007](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2007/lover) | [v2006...v2007](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2006...v2007) | 1284 vedtak |
| `v2008` | [v2008](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2008/lover) | [v2007...v2008](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2007...v2008) | 1383 vedtak |
| `v2009` | [v2009](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2009/lover) | [v2008...v2009](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2008...v2009) | 1338 vedtak |
| `v2010` | [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2010/lover) | [v2009...v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2009...v2010) | 1352 vedtak |
| `v2011` | [v2011](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2011/lover) | [v2010...v2011](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2010...v2011) | 1180 vedtak |
| `v2012` | [v2012](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2012/lover) | [v2011...v2012](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2011...v2012) | 1194 vedtak |
| `v2013` | [v2013](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2013/lover) | [v2012...v2013](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2012...v2013) | 1437 vedtak |
| `v2014` | [v2014](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2014/lover) | [v2013...v2014](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2013...v2014) | 1423 vedtak |
| `v2015` | [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2015/lover) | [v2014...v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2014...v2015) | 1478 vedtak |
| `v2016` | [v2016](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2016/lover) | [v2015...v2016](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2015...v2016) | 1545 vedtak |
| `v2017` | [v2017](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2017/lover) | [v2016...v2017](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2016...v2017) | 1597 vedtak |
| `v2018` | [v2018](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2018/lover) | [v2017...v2018](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2017...v2018) | 1438 vedtak |
| `v2019` | [v2019](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2019/lover) | [v2018...v2019](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2018...v2019) | 1352 vedtak |
| `v2020` | [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2020/lover) | [v2019...v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2019...v2020) | 2145 vedtak |
| `v2021` | [v2021](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2021/lover) | [v2020...v2021](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2020...v2021) | 2345 vedtak |
| `v2022` | [v2022](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2022/lover) | [v2021...v2022](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2021...v2022) | 1851 vedtak |
| `v2023` | [v2023](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2023/lover) | [v2022...v2023](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2022...v2023) | 1629 vedtak |
| `v2024` | [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2024/lover) | [v2023...v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2023...v2024) | 1584 vedtak |
| `v2025` | [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2025/lover) | [v2024...v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2024...v2025) | 1717 vedtak |
| `v2026` | [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/tree/v2026/lover) | [v2025...v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/compare/v2025...v2026) | 1111 vedtak |

## Verktøy

- [Søk i lover](sok.qmd) — finn lover etter tittel eller korttittel
- [Sammenlign lovversjon](diff.qmd) — velg lov og to årstall for å se endringer

## Bruk med git

```bash
# Klon historikk-grenen
git clone -b law-history https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws.git
cd norwegian-laws

# Se en lov slik den var i 2020
git show v2020:lover/lov-1998-07-17-56.md

# Sammenlign to versjoner av en lov
git diff v2020 v2024 -- lover/lov-1998-07-17-56.md

# Se alle endringer mellom to år
git diff --stat v2023 v2024
```
